installCommand: if [ -d "flutter" ]; then rm -rf flutter; fi && git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable --depth 1 && ./flutter/bin/flutter doctor
buildCommand: ./flutter/bin/flutter build web --release --web-renderer html && cp web/google3648f8a8f8383144.html build/web/ && (cp web/maahvi_lottery.apk build/web/ || true)
